articles.title: Munisar replaces Brathwaite as West Indies name T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The same squad will face Ireland and Pakistan in a tri-nation T20I series, which got underway on May 28

articles.title: Harmanpreet: India looking for 'clarity' on best XI ahead of T20 World Cup
articles.description: Hole left by absent allrounders could mean opportunities for Radha Yadav and Bharti Fulmali

articles.title: Ravindra and Blundell tons lead New Zealand revival
articles.description: Ireland had the visitors at 86 for 4 in Dublin but struggled to push their advantage forward

articles.title: Alice Tector replaces injured Laura Delany in Ireland's T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: Tector will also be part of Ireland's home tri-series against West Indies and Pakistan which starts on Thursday

articles.title: Ireland host rare home Test as New Zealand seek red-ball rhythm
articles.description: This will be the first ever Test between the two countries, who have both had little red-ball practice lately

articles.title: Marsh out of Pakistan series with ankle injury, Inglis to captain
articles.description: Stand-in skipper Marsh has been withdrawn due to an ankle injury with his availability for the Bangladesh tour to be determined

articles.title: Sri Lanka name Kusal Mendis ODI and T20I captain for WI tour
articles.description: Wanindu Hasaranga is set to return to action in ODIs and T20Is since tearing his hamstring early in the T20 World Cup in February

articles.title: Gibson, Dean knock over NZ for 80 as England cruise to series win
articles.description: England closed out the chase in the decider with seven wickets and 37 balls to spare

articles.title: Australia women's coach Shelley Nitschke signs three-year contract extension
articles.description: Will remain in her role until June 2029 during a time when more change is likely

articles.title: Hayley Matthews to lead West Indies Women's squad at ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026
articles.description: Other senior names like Qiana Joseph, Deandra Dottin and Afy Fletcher have also been announced in the 15-member squad.

articles.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 to have all-women panel of match officials
articles.description: This is the third, consecutive appointment of an all-female Match Officials Panel for the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup.

articles.title: West Indies legend elected as new President of Lancashire Cricket
articles.description: Former England Women’s star and 2017 World Cup-winning bowler, Alex Hartley, also joined the board after being appointed as the Vice-President of Lancashire Cricket.

articles.title: 'Positive and smart cricket can live together' - Brendon McCullum hints at refined approach to Test cricket ahead of England vs New Zealand
articles.description: There have been a ton of reservations surrounding the way England have approached Test cricket, particularly after their disappointing 4-1 Ashes defeat at the hands of Australia.
